name: The Charles Schwab Corporation Depositary Shares each representing 1/40th interest in a share of 5.95% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series D
summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation is a financial services company that offers brokerage, banking, and investment advisory services. SCHW^D represents depositary shares for the 5.95% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series D. The company is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
